[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101010101 5
1 011111110 7
2 111101001 6
3 000000000 a
4 001001101 4
5 001011101 5
6 000000010 1
7 000000010 1

01 011001111 6
12 101111101 7
23 100000010 2
34 010001011 4
45 111111100 7
56 001010100 3
67 011101000 4
70 101111011 7

02 001001101 4 match 4
13 110000000 2
24 001110110 5
35 010001000 2
46 001010111 5
57 101000011 4
60 001101100 4
71 001001011 4

14 011110100 5

72 011001001 4
